TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Plmwan ga niya mki sku Sincik Keng atu Nahuy go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 36 buwan, 137 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 97% kyan ku 133 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 3% kyan ku 4 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 93%, Amis 1%, Paywan 1%, saySiyat 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Plmwan hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'zil na Plmwan hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Plmwan hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na Plmwan hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'zil na Plmwan hya' ga Quri . tay 'llaw na Plmwan hya' ga Tayax. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŇč plmwan …£a nija mki s~…ēku s~…ēin ¶~ ®ik keŇč atu nańßuj …£o, kwara s~…ēali ő≤uwan nja …£a ** ő≤uwan, *** ńßi ku kwara s~…ē Ēuli tajan. s~…ē Ēuli tajan pins~…ēpŇčan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a **% kjan ku *** ńßi, ő≤inańß …£a, Ējat kańßun s~…ēku pins~…ēpŇčan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a *% kjan ku * ńßi nja. pins~…ēpuŇč na linńßujan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a, tajan **%, amis~…ē *%, pajwan *%, s~…ēajs~…ēijat *%, ő≤inańß lińßujan s~…ē Ēuli *%. maki qu Ňčas~…ēal ő≤ziran. rńßzjal kki Ēan taj Ēllaw na plmwan ńßja Ē …£a r…£jax krańßu Ē. taj Ēzil na plmwan ńßja Ē …£a r…£jax krańßu Ē. taj mkjańßu Ē na plmwan ńßja Ē …£a r…£jax krańßu Ē. taj mkraja Ē na plmwan ńßja Ē …£a r…£jax krańßu Ē. taj Ēzil na plmwan ńßja Ē …£a quri . taj Ēllaw na plmwan ńßja Ē …£a tajax. rekis~…ēi kajal kjokaj s~…ēs~…ēquliq pinlp…£an ppqő≤aqan pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru Ēlaqi Ē ¶~ ®ikuj pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru Ēlaqi Ē mrkjas~…ē tuqi Ēs~…ēan ő≤as~…ēu kis~…ēja Ē …£l…£an s~…ēpjaŇčan na pinő≤ańßu uő≤uj qqmajńß
S.FORM: alang Plmwan ga niya mki sku Sincik Keng atu Nahuy go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 36 buwan, 137 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 97% kyan ku 133 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 3% kyan ku 4 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 93%, Amis 1%, Paywan 1%, saySiyat 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Plmwan hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'zil na Plmwan hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Plmwan hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na Plmwan hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'zil na Plmwan hya' ga Quri . tay 'llaw na Plmwan hya' ga Tayax. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŇč plmwan …£a nija mki s~…ēku s~…ēin ¶~ ®ik keŇč atu nańßuj …£o, kwara s~…ēali ő≤uwan nja …£a ** ő≤uwan, *** ńßi ku kwara s~…ē Ēuli tajan. s~…ē Ēuli tajan pins~…ēpŇčan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a **% kjan ku *** ńßi, ő≤inańß …£a, Ējat kańßun s~…ēku pins~…ēpŇčan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a *% kjan ku * ńßi nja. pins~…ēpuŇč na linńßujan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a, tajan **%, amis~…ē *%, pajwan *%, s~…ēajs~…ēijat *%, ő≤inańß lińßujan s~…ē Ēuli *%. maki qu Ňčas~…ēal ő≤ziran. rńßzjal kki Ēan taj Ēllaw na plmwan ńßja Ē …£a r…£jax krańßu Ē. taj Ēzil na plmwan ńßja Ē …£a r…£jax krańßu Ē. taj mkjańßu Ē na plmwan ńßja Ē …£a r…£jax krańßu Ē. taj mkraja Ē na plmwan ńßja Ē …£a r…£jax krańßu Ē. taj Ēzil na plmwan ńßja Ē …£a quri . taj Ēllaw na plmwan ńßja Ē …£a tajax. rekis~…ēi kajal kjokaj s~…ēs~…ēquliq pinlp…£an ppqő≤aqan pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru Ēlaqi Ē ¶~ ®ikuj pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru Ēlaqi Ē mrkjas~…ē tuqi Ēs~…ēan ő≤as~…ēu kis~…ēja Ē …£l…£an s~…ēpjaŇčan na pinő≤ańßu uő≤uj qqmajńß
